elements.text:
This completes your participation in our study. Thank you! 

Within the next 2 weeks, you should receive an emailed electronic gift card to thank you for your participation. The email will come from noreply@tangocard.com. If you don't see the email within 2 weeks, please be sure to check your spam folder. 

Questions? Please email us at MindTrailsMovement@uvahealth.org.
